name: Title Loans Orange County
description_short: Max Cash offers title loans in Westminster, CA and other locations, providing fast cash loans secured by vehicle titles with competitive rates and flexible terms.
description_long:
Max Cash is a title loan lender operating under the Tradition Media Group LLC and ML Enterprise Inc. corporate structure, offering emergency cash loans to California consumers who own vehicles. The company specializes in title loans—secured loans where borrowers pledge their car title as collateral in exchange for quick cash funding.

The company's primary service is car title loans marketed as "emergency cash" solutions, allowing borrowers to access funds based on their vehicle's equity. Max Cash also offers related auto financing products including car finance loans for vehicle purchases and car refinance options to lower existing payments. The application process is streamlined online, requiring information about the vehicle (year, make, model, mileage) and personal details (income, insurance status, ownership status).

Max Cash distinguishes itself through a multi-channel application approach, offering instant pre-approval via phone at (833) 207-9052, online form submission, and text options. The company emphasizes competitive rates and "convenient terms" as key differentiators. Their online platform collects extensive financial information and explicitly partners with up to six third-party lenders and financial services partners to facilitate loan matching.

However, prospective borrowers should note that title loans carry inherent risks: they require surrendering vehicle title as collateral (meaning default could result in vehicle repossession), typically carry higher interest rates than traditional loans, and consumers may lose transportation if unable to repay. The company's data-sharing practices extend to multiple partners for marketing purposes, and the application process involves FCRA credit checks and consent to communications via automated dialing systems.
pros: Offers instant pre-approval via phone with quick application process
Multiple application channels: online form, phone (833) 207-9052, and text-based options
Streamlined online application requiring basic vehicle and income information
Advertises competitive rates and convenient terms for title loans
Provides multiple loan product options beyond title loans (refinance, purchase financing)
No visible prepayment penalties mentioned on application page
Accessible website with screen-reader mode support (Alt+1)
cons: Title loans require surrendering vehicle title as collateral, risking vehicle repossession on default
Applicants consent to contact from up to six third-party partners and affiliated companies via automated dialing/SMS, creating marketing exposure
No transparent APR or rate information displayed on the website—rates are determined after application review
Data shared with multiple partners including Fiona.com and Engine by MoneyLion for credit checks and marketing
Title loans typically carry higher interest rates than unsecured personal loans, making them expensive emergency financing
best_for: Vehicle owners facing immediate cash needs who have equity in a paid-off or financed car
Borrowers with fair or poor credit who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
Consumers seeking same-day or next-day funding and willing to accept collateral-based lending terms
diagnosis: Max Cash is best suited for vehicle owners in California needing fast emergency cash who are willing to pledge their car title as collateral and accept higher interest rates typical of secured lending. The primary caveat is the repossession risk and lack of transparent rate disclosure upfront—borrowers should only pursue title loans if they are confident in their ability to repay, as vehicle loss is a realistic downside risk.
services: Car title loans for emergency cash needs
Car finance loans for vehicle purchases
Car refinance loans to lower existing monthly payments
Multi-lender matching (up to six partner lenders)
FCRA credit checks and credit authorization
Newsletter signup with exclusive financial offers
